notes: Stability rebuild for SA CHECK V1.0.8 Stable without changing the version number.
Clickable containers no longer force ink feedback when wrapping input controls.
Calendar event save/delete errors now show a message instead of leaving the dialog stuck.
Stabilized Calendar event dialog click handling.
Removed nested DatePicker/TimePicker popups from inside the edit dialog.
Moved Calendar event buttons back to standard AlertDialog actions.
Added direct date/time validation so invalid values do not save.
Calendar event save still uses YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM values.
No Work folder, settings, or cache behavior is changed.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
